basic emoji
.
:smile:
.
<p>😄</p>
.
multiple emoji
.
:100: :heart: :fire:
.
<p>💯 ❤️ 🔥</p>
.
unknown emoji passes through
.
:unknown_xyz:
.
<p>:unknown_xyz:</p>
.
emoji in text
.
text :smile: text
.
<p>text 😄 text</p>
.
emoji in code span
.
`:smile:`
.
<p><code>:smile:</code></p>
.
adjacent emoji
.
:smile::heart:
.
<p>😄❤️</p>
.
emoji with plus
.
:+1:
.
<p>👍</p>
.
emoji with dash
.
:e-mail:
.
<p>📧</p>
.
escaped colon before
.
\:smile:
.
<p>:smile:</p>
.
escaped colon after
.
:smile\:
.
<p>:smile:</p>
.
multiple emoji in line
.
a :smile: b :heart: c
.
<p>a 😄 b ❤️ c</p>
.
emoji in emphasis
.
*:smile:*
.
<p><em>😄</em></p>
.
emoji in strong
.
**:smile:**
.
<p><strong>😄</strong></p>
.
emoji in link text
.
[:smile:](url)
.
<p><a href="url">😄</a></p>
.
colon without closing
.
:incomplete
.
<p>:incomplete</p>
.
empty colons
.
::
.
<p>::</p>
.
colon in url no match
.
http://example.com
.
<p>http://example.com</p>
.
emoji at line start
.
:fire: start
.
<p>🔥 start</p>
.
emoji at line end
.
end :fire:
.
<p>end 🔥</p>
.
emoji in heading
.
# :star: Title
.
<h1>⭐ Title</h1>
.
emoji in list
.
- :smile: item
.
<ul>
<li>😄 item</li>
</ul>
.
single char emoji
.
a :x: b
.
<p>a ❌ b</p>
.
